strategy: Team fight at 15,320 Health. Hit Myth, Life, or Death, and avoid Balance.
Clear his two brother minions, Lacombe and Berkshire, first, but be ready: once they are gone he cheat-casts a Hound spell every Round.
Those Hounds are damage-over-time hits, so have Triage or Absorbs on hand and do not let the fight drag.
Stack blades on one hitter and burst him down soon after the minions die.
cheatNotes: Once both brother minions are gone, he opens every Round by cheat-casting a Hound spell (Storm Hound, Heck Hound, Blight Hound, or Big Bad Hound). Keep damage-over-time removal ready and kill quickly.
